name: Lucksworn
description: A class that heavily relies on luck to win battles

skills.name: Gambler's fate
skills.description: Deal 20% more damage with each successful hit, but reduce hit chance by 16%.

skills.name: Second Chance
skills.description: After missing an attack, you roll the sworn dice. If you get a 6, you get another chance to hit.

skills.name: Guaranteed Win
skills.description: Every 9/8/7/6/5-th hit is guaranteed to hit and deal 25% more damage

skills.name: High Roller
skills.description:
10% to double received loot 
1% to lose loot
